deviations.what: the row Popover (bindElement to the pressed row in the original) is built per-press via popover_display from the row values passed as event args (ProductId/Name/ProductPicUrl), anchored by $event.oSource.sId; the disable/enable-pointer-events-while-open behavior is dropped.
Link.ariaHasPopup (since 1.86) is kept 1:1 on the popover link; needs UI5 >= 1.86.
